    DR. MASON KIM IS BACK IN THE TOWN OF BLACKFALDS!

    Welcome to Blackfalds Smiles, where we offer comprehensive dental services to both children and adults. Our team of experienced professionals are dedicated to providing you with personalized care that utilizes state-of-the-art technology to ensure that you have a positive and comfortable experience.

    OUR PROMISE

    At Blackfalds Smiles, we believe that a visit to the dentist should be a positive and educational experience. Our team is dedicated to providing our patients with compassionate and comfortable care, regardless of the treatment they need. From routine cleanings to in-depth procedures, we ensure that each patient is well-informed and involved in their own dental health.

    WE FOLLOW THE FEE GUIDE AND OFFER DIRECT BILLING

    In addition to offering top-quality dental treatments, Blackfalds Smiles also provides convenient and affordable options for payment. We understand that dental care can be a significant expense, which is why we strive to make it accessible for everyone.

    ​

    We follow the Alberta fee guide set by the ADA&C to ensure transparency and fairness in our pricing. This means you can trust that you are receiving the best possible care at a reasonable cost.

    ​

    We also offer direct insurance billing to make the process even more convenient for our patients. Our team will handle all the paperwork and communication with your insurance company, so you don't have to worry about it.

    NEW PATIENTS
    WARMLY WELCOMED

    YOUR ONLY PRIVATELY OWNED FAMILY DENTAL CLINIC IN BLACKFALDS

    As a leading provider of dental services in Blackfalds, we are committed to providing our patients with the highest level of care possible. Whether you need preventative care to maintain your oral health or more complex treatments to restore your smile, our team is equipped with the latest technology and techniques to ensure that you receive the best possible results. We are always happy to answer any questions you may have and work with you to develop a personalized treatment plan that meets your unique needs and goals.

    OUR RANGE OF DENTAL SERVICES

    At Blackfalds Smiles, our range of dental services includes everything from basic hygiene to cosmetic dentistry and orthodontics. We want our patients to leave our office with a bright and healthy smile, which is why we utilize the latest technologies to deliver the best possible results. Come see us today and let us take care of your oral health needs!

    SCHEDULE YOUR APPOINTMENT FOR FAMILY DENTISTRY SERVICES IN BLACKFALDS TODAY

    We understand that dental appointments can be stressful, which is why we make it easy for you to schedule your family's next appointment. With our convenient online scheduling tool, you can book your appointment for family dentistry 24/7, at your own convenience.

    LEARN MORE

    At Blackfalds Smiles, we offer comprehensive dental care for the whole family. Our services include dental cleanings, checkups, tooth fillings, crowns and bridges, root canals, extractions, dentures, and cosmetic dentistry in Blackfalds like teeth whitening and veneers. We also provide emergency dental services near Blackfalds for urgent issues.

    As a trusted Blackfalds dentist, we provide personalized, compassionate dental care in a friendly and welcoming environment. Our experienced dental team serves patients of all ages, making us a one-stop solution for family dental care in Blackfalds. We're proud to be locally owned and committed to our community’s health.

    Yes! We’re currently accepting new patients and families. Whether you’re new to the area or looking to switch providers, we welcome you to experience our patient-focused approach. We also offer walk-in dental appointments in Blackfalds when available.

    We are an affordable dental clinic in Blackfalds and follow the Alberta Dental Fee Guide. We work with most insurance plans and provide treatment estimates in advance, so you can make informed decisions. Our team is happy to help you understand your dental coverage.

    Yes. If you're experiencing pain, swelling, or have had a dental injury, call us right away. We prioritize urgent cases and do our best to offer same-day emergency dentist appointments near you.

    Absolutely. We offer professional teeth whitening in Blackfalds, veneers, and other cosmetic treatments to improve the appearance of your smile. Ask us how we can help you achieve a brighter, more confident look.

    We use modern dental technology such as digital x-rays, intraoral cameras, and up-to-date sterilization systems to ensure safe, efficient, and accurate treatments. Our goal is to provide the highest standard of care in a comfortable setting.

    Our experienced and compassionate team of licensed dentists in Blackfalds are dedicated to continuing education and advanced dental techniques. We take the time to explain your treatment options and are committed to long-term patient relationships.

    For most people, a visit to your family dentist in Blackfalds every six months is ideal for maintaining optimal oral health. We’ll tailor your treatment plan based on your individual needs to help prevent cavities, gum disease, and more.

    Booking is easy! Call us at (587) 507-5399 or schedule online at www.blackfaldssmiles.ca. We’re conveniently located at 5109 Indiana St, Blackfalds, Alberta, T0M 0J0, and offer flexible hours to fit your family’s busy schedule.
